gist.headline: Daily README Refresh
gist.blurb: The hive's daily chore: keeping the front page fresh with the latest news and apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recent community apps.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's landing page up-to-date with the latest community activity.
gist.visual_concept: A cute pixel art robot or bee updating a bulletin board. Since it's an automated bot PR, the Monitor Robot fits perfectly, pinning new papers to a board.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head pinning fresh pixelated notes to a wooden bulletin board, while the bee mascot watches happily. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head pinning fresh pixelated notes to a wooden bulletin board, while the bee mascot watches happily.
